ENABLE_PLUGIN_DESC: Enable support for physical keyboard and other tuning
ENABLE_COMPACT_MODE_DESC: Hide full keyboard from virtual keyboard
COMPACT_ONLY_PHYSICAL_KEYBOARD_DESC: Do not enable compact mode when no physical keyboard is connected
DISABLE_VK_DESC: Make virtual keyboard never pop up
KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT_DESC: Listen Ctrl+Space to show virtual keyboard
BLACKLIST_DETECTED_PHYS_DESC: Add all currently detected keyboards to blacklist
RESET_BLACKLIST_DEFAULT_DESC: Clear custom entries and restore built-in defaults
